SEARCH
Package io.github.lengors.scoutdesk.domain.metadata

Interface MetadataRegistry<T extends @NotNull Object>

Type Parameters:
T - the type of metadata, which must be a non-null object
All Known Implementing Classes:
EphemeralMetadataRegistry
public interface MetadataRegistry<T extends @NotNull Object>
An interface for managing metadata associated with arbitrary objects.

This registry allows associating metadata of type T with a given target object, retrieving metadata for a specific target, streaming associated metadata, and unbinding metadata from a target.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    bind(Object target, T metadata)
    Associates the specified metadata with the given target object.
    @Nullable T
    get(Object target)
    Retrieves the metadata associated with the specified target object, if present.
    Stream<T>
    stream(Object target)
    Streams the metadata associated with the specified target object, if metadata is present.
    @Nullable T
    unbind(Object target)
    Unbinds and removes the metadata associated with the given target object, if any exists.

  • Method Details

    • bind

      void bind(Object target, T metadata)
      Associates the specified metadata with the given target object. If the target already has existing metadata bound, it will be replaced with the new metadata.
      Parameters:
      target - the object to which the metadata is to be bound; must not be null
      metadata - the metadata to associate with the given target; must not be null

    • get

      @Nullable T get(Object target)
      Retrieves the metadata associated with the specified target object, if present.
      Parameters:
      target - the object for which to retrieve associated metadata; must not be null
      Returns:
      the metadata associated with the specified target, or null if no metadata is associated

    • stream

      Stream<T> stream(Object target)
      Streams the metadata associated with the specified target object, if metadata is present. The stream will contain at most one element, which is the metadata associated with the target, or be empty if no metadata is associated with the target.
      Parameters:
      target - the object for which to stream associated metadata; must not be null
      Returns:
      a stream containing the metadata associated with the specified target, or an empty stream if no metadata is associated

    • unbind

      @Nullable T unbind(Object target)
      Unbinds and removes the metadata associated with the given target object, if any exists. If no metadata is associated with the target, this method returns null.
      Parameters:
      target - the object whose associated metadata is to be removed; must not be null
      Returns:
      the metadata that was previously associated with the specified target, or null if no metadata was associated
